sections.paragraph:
m. (root בֹוא) pl. ־ִים and ־ֹות.

(1) an entering, Eze 26:10.

(2) entrance, approach. Jud 1:24, 25 Jdg 1:25, מְבֹוא הָעִיר “the entrance of the city,” i.e. the gate. Pro 8:3, מְבֹוא פְתָתִים “at the entrance of the gate.”

(3) מְבאֹ הַשֶׁמֶשׁ the entrance (i.e. place of setting) of the sun, the west, Deu 11:30 Psa 50:1 in acc. towards the west, Jos 1:4.
